title: Employee and Retirement Resources
description: Find links to benefits for past and present Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory employees, services and programming and publications dedicated to highlighting employees’ contributions to our enduring mission.
text:
Building Community Around Shared Experiences
Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL) has a vibrant culture that keeps its people — a group fondly known as "Labbies" — at the core. From educational programming to insurance and retirement benefits, we pride ourselves on providing support and resources to both former and current employees.
Here you can find links to benefits for past and present employees, services and programming and publications dedicated to highlighting employees’ contributions to our enduring mission.
